New Project Enquiry
Accepting new projects

Start a project
with HS108.

Book a discovery meeting. ₹2,000 + GST — non-refundable,
fully applied toward your project.

Email Directly

Takes 4–5 minutes · No commitment until booking

01 / Domain

What kind of work
are you commissioning?

02 / Plan

Choose your
engagement.

All plans begin with a ₹2,000 discovery meeting — non-refundable, credited to your project.

03 / Your Details

Who are we
working with?

Name is required
Valid email is required
04 / Review

Review your
brief.

Domain —
Plan —
Name —

Company —
Discovery Meeting Fee ₹2,000 + GST

Not right? Use the back button to edit any step.

05 / Terms

Before we
proceed.

The ₹2,000 + GST booking fee reserves your discovery meeting slot. It is non-refundable but fully credited toward your project invoice. No scope is committed at this stage — the meeting is to define the brief, not to approve a quote.

HS108 may decline a project after the discovery meeting if the scope is not a fit. In that case, the booking fee is forfeit per our standard terms.

06 / Payment

Book your
discovery meeting.

Discovery Meeting Fee ₹2,000 + GST (18%) = ₹2,360

This fee reserves your slot and is non-refundable. It is credited in full to your project invoice. Accepted: UPI, cards, net banking.

Payment integration coming — we'll contact you to arrange the booking.

Secured by Razorpay · PCI-DSS Compliant

✓

Booking confirmed.

You'll receive a calendar invite within 24 hours.
We'll review your brief before the call.
